who: HR managers in small accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month
offer: For HR managers in small accounting firms processing 5–15 payrolls/month, inefficient reporting causes delays in benefits enrollment. We automate report generation instead of manual data entry and formatting in spreadsheets.
problem: Inefficient generation of benefits enrollment reports from raw payroll data.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for HR managers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to HR managers with demo video
Community forums for sharing HR tools
try_it: Let users try template selection and manual invoice entry
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing payroll data
